stemHtml:
You are in a controlled airspace under VFR, your minimal IAS is 150 kt. Visibility dropped below 5000 m. Which of the following are your actions?

1. Continue VFR as long as visibility does not drop below 1500 m, additional clearance is not required
2. Proceed IFR, additional clearance is not required
3. Proceed to alternate in VMC
4. Request special VFR if airspeed can be reduced
